text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's running style is unlike any seen before... And the
more we train, the more we understand it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... She's going even faster than before.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's running medium-distance like it's a mile! Suzuka really is
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Should we take a break? Let me know if I'm going too hard on you.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Should we take a break? Let me know if I'm going too hard on you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thanks... But I'm fine. The fun I'm having outweighs the fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Despite the sweat dripping down her face, Silence Suzuka is still beaming. That positive attitude of hers shows in her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her abilities are already incredible... Just what sort of running will
come about if we continue down this path?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You've got a lot of talent, but it's a little unrefined. If we polish it
juuust right, we'll have ourselves a diamond.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You've got a lot of talent, but it's a little unrefined. If we polish it
juuust right, we'll have ourselves a diamond.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But if we want to reach for the clouds, we need to make sure the
foundation is solid.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But if we want to reach for the clouds, we need to make sure the
foundation is solid.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A solid foundation... Okay, I understand. I'll take a short break.
choice_data_list: Remember, our journey is just beginning!
Remember, our journey is just beginning!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
From this, we can determine that ramp training builds muscle in the
quadriceps, leading to explosive power...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Haven't seen you in the library for a long time. Did your trainer tell
you to do some research?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm just looking into effective training methods to help improve
my ability even more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My trainer's doing a wonderful job, so it's not like I'm worried. I just
don't like standing still.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... Sounds like you found the perfect team for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And it really shows in your racing. No one would even dream of
winning a race running like you do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If it were any other racer, I'd caution you against your current style.
But I have a feeling you'll be able to master that otherworldly running
of yours.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I know I will. After all, the scenery down that path is calling me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty excited myself. I want to see that fantastical running of
yours, but I also can't wait to beat it with my own.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm sure you'll have the chance.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru?! What are you wearing?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me... Is this your newest good-luck outfit?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Not at all! I was doing some physical therapy in the pool!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's right, you were injured during training, weren't you?
Unfortunate as it may be, at least it didn't happen during a race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. When I try to imagine such a scenario, I get chills... All hail
the great Shiraoki for preventing such a grave situation! Thank
youuu...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that's not why I'm here! I just heard some dreadful news, so I
came here as fast as I could!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, is it true that your next race is the Kinko Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, that's correct...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hnngh! To think I'd be up against a soaring eagle like you in my great
return to racing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just as I was feeling good about my future, I receive this most
devastating news. Don't tell me... Disaster approaches!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You could be that disaster, Fukukitaru. I saw you win the Kikuka Sho.
You were amazing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. That sprint in the homestretch was magnificent. Have some
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hrrrm... Perhaps I am overreacting. There's no telling how this race will unfold.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right! I'm a G1 title holder! Others might count me out, but guess what? I've got what it takes to win despite my hiatus!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! That smile has me scared all over again! I knew it, a great
misfortune awaits! Shiraokiiiiii!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, for—shut up and go back to the pool already!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Think we'll see Silence Suzuka outrun the rest of the racers today?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Are you kidding? Have you seen this lineup? No way it's gonna be
that easy!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think she can do it! Show us that amazing running of yours,
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: We cranked up the intensity of your training, but you took it in stride.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about the scenery I'll see after all this hard work made any
fatigue I had just disappear.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Every day is such a joy. I can feel myself running towards my dreams.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way. I wake up every morning wondering just how
much you'll grow today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then I suppose I'll have to show you in today's race. I promise that I
won't let anyone else take the lead.
choice_data_list:
That's right, now go find your one-of-a-kind
scenery!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I will!
